title: Diporidium madagascariense
taxonomy: Diporidium madagascariense is a genus of extinct plants within the family of Bennettitaceae, which belongs to the division Cycadophyta. This classification suggests that Diporidium madagascariense is closely related to cycads and other related ancient plants. The Bennettitaceae family is thought to have originated during the Triassic period and became extinct by the Cretaceous period. As a member of the Bennettitaceae family, Diporidium madagascariense shares characteristics with other extinct plants of the same family. Further research and classification may provide more detailed information about the specific classification of Diporidium madagascariense.
